title: Morgan Kaufmann's Role in Cloud Computing Literature
description: A diagram showing the relationship between the academic publisher Morgan Kaufmann and key cloud computing knowledge areas, highlighting its role in disseminating foundational computer science concepts.
elements: Cloud Computing Core Concepts (e.g., Distributed Systems, Virtualization, Networking)
relationships: Morgan Kaufmann publishes authoritative textbooks and papers authored by researchers, which define and explain the core concepts that form the foundation of modern cloud computing.
